description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender, athletic build and exaggerated proportions, particularly in the upper body and hair. The figure features a very large, voluminous ponytail that arcs dramatically behind the head, creating a striking silhouette. The face is smooth and symmetrical, with defined cheekbones and a neutral expression. The figure is minimally dressed, wearing a form-fitting top and shorts, with no visible accessories or carried items. The skin appears smooth and uniform, and the limbs are elongated and proportionate. The overall appearance is that of a modern, animated character designed for visual impact in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult female figure with an exaggeratedly large ponytail and minimal, form-fitting clothing, featuring a smooth, athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical face, outstretched arms, and the full volume of the large ponytail behind the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dramatic arc and thickness of the ponytail, as well as the figure's profile and athletic build.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the full, flowing shape of the ponytail and the back contours of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail's curve and the figure's side profile.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
